title: P&P Launch — Mon Jun 1 — Tomorrow at 8AM (pre-launch tease)
text:
Tomorrow at 8AM Central, the doors open.

Be Transformed by the Renewal of Your Mind. A 90-day guided journal for the woman who wants more than highlights and good intentions.

I'm Miriam. I've been carrying this in my heart for years. Tomorrow it becomes something you can hold.

220 spots. $50 each. Funded by you, printed by us, mailed straight to your front door.

If you want to be on the list, sign up at paperandpurpose.co. Tomorrow morning, I send the link first to my list.

title: P&P Launch — Tue Jun 2 8AM — It's open (LAUNCH POST)
text:
It's open.

220 spots. $50 each. 90 days of guided pages designed to renew the way you think.

This isn't another Bible study. It's a journal for the woman who wants to process what she's learning and walk through the actual exercise of renewal. Twelve named sections. Watercolor on every page. Pen-friendly paper. Stickers with sass.

Get yours at paperandpurpose.co.

If we hit 220, we print. If we don't, every cent comes back to you. Either way, you're not on the hook for an idea that didn't land.

title: P&P Launch — Wed Jun 3 — What's inside (product detail)
text:
What you actually get.

Twelve named sections. Watercolor and butterflies on every page. Pen-friendly paper that doesn't bleed. Two sheets of stickers with sass.

This is not a Bible study. It's a guided journal that asks four questions every day:

What is the Lord saying to me right now?
What am I carrying?
What needs to change?
What did He answer?

It's the journal I wished existed when I was carrying things I didn't have language for.

90 days. paperandpurpose.co.

title: P&P Launch — Thu Jun 4 — Voice from me (voice memo CTA)
text:
A voice from me to you.

I recorded a two-minute voice note about why I made this and who it's for. It's at paperandpurpose.co/pages/voice-note.

It's not polished. It's me, on a regular day, telling you why I think you'll like this journal. Press play when you have a quiet minute.

If after that you still want in, the pre-launch link is on the same page. 220 spots. We've already got names on the list.

title: P&P Launch — Fri Jun 5 — Journal vs Bible study
text:
Why a journal and not a Bible study.

There are countless beautiful Bible studies out there. I love a good Bible study.

This isn't that.

This is for the woman who wants a journal that has multiple purposes. A spot to jot what she's learning in the Word, plus a place to process her worries and walk through the actual exercise of renewing her mind.

That's why every prompt pulls you toward action and reflection. Not more content. More space to hear and respond.

90 days. paperandpurpose.co.

title: P&P Launch — Sat Jun 6 — Why 90 days
text:
Why 90 days.

I tried 30. Not long enough. The renewal of your mind doesn't fit in a month.
I tried 365. Too long. Nobody finishes.

90 came out of prayer. Three months. Long enough for a habit to take root. Short enough that you can see the finish line from the beginning.

You can do hard things for 90 days. That's the math.

paperandpurpose.co. Pre-launch is open.

title: P&P Launch — Sun Jun 7 — Romans 12:2 (Sunday soft)
text:
Be transformed by the renewal of your mind. Romans 12:2.

This is the verse that started everything. Not just for the journal. For me.

If you've been thinking about it all week, the link is in my bio. Take your time deciding. The journal will be here when you're ready.

Be transformed. The work happens in the renewing.

title: P&P Launch — Mon Jun 8 — One week in (community / progress)
text:
One week in.

Here's where we are. [X] of 220 spots filled. Print run unlocks at 220.

I want to be honest. I didn't know what kind of week this would be. I prayed about it. I built it. I'm trusting it.

If you've been on the fence, this is the week to decide. We close pre-launch when the spots fill, and the next window won't open for a while.

paperandpurpose.co.
